Name: Cinescape Al - Sharqia
About: Cinescape SHARQIYAH opened its doors to the public in 1998 in downtown Kuwait, Sharq. The Cinema went under an extreme renovation in 2014 where it currently seats 878 movie-goers. It is located along the coastal road inside Souk Sharq.

Name: Cinescape Al - Bairaq
About: Cinescape Bairaq which is located in Al-Aqailah area opened its doors to movie-goers in 2009. The 3 screen venue quickly became an important location to movie-goers that were living in the Governorate of Ahmadi as the mall is built in the middle of the residential areas of the Governorate. The theatre has a total capacity of 481 seats.

Name: Cinescape Avenues
About: Cinescape The Avenues launched in the year of 2007 in the biggest mall in the State of Kuwait, The Avenues Mall. This unique location was the landmark for the new Era of Cinescape as it quickly became the leader of technology and state of the art theater design on a global level. The cinema has 11 screens including 2 VIP theaters that can holds 23 seats in each and the first and only Dolby Atmos Theater in Kuwait. The Cinema has a total capacity level of 1,662 seats.

Name: Cinescape Plaza Complex
About: Cinescape 360 became the biggest Cinema Multiplex in the State of Kuwait in the year of 2009. With 2,687 seats spread across 15 screens made the cinema a regional attraction as it holds 2 VIP Screens that have state of the art facilities serving 48 customers per screen and the first ever Digital IMAX Screen. Cinescape 360 is located within 360 Mall on the 6th Ring Road in South Surra and fast became the number one attraction to entertainment seekers due to its size and variety in films.

Name: Cinescape Al - Kout
About: Cinescape KOUT is the second location to open in Fahaheel area. When the brand new and traditional mall opened its doors to customers in 2005, Cinescape announced its new 4 screen venue within the mall. The cinema came at a perfect time to compliment Ajial after operating alone for 2 years in the region. Cinescape KOUT has a seating capacity of 840 seats.

Name: Cinescape Ajail
About: Cinescape AJIAL was the first Cinema to open in Fahaheel in the year of 2003 to serve the growing community in the area. With its 4 state of the art cinema screens facilities, it quickly became one of the more visited cinemas due to its convenience and comfort. Located in Ajial Mall in Fahaheel, Cinescape made sure that every movie-goer no matter where they lived had a Cinema within 15-20 minutes away from their home. The Theater has a total capacity level of 1050 seats.

Name: Cinescape Laila
About: Cinescape LAILA became the third Theatre to open in the Salmiyah area and in Salem Al Mubarak street in the year of 2002. The stand alone theatre is known for its great location, and the main Festival Theatre in Kuwait. It has been the host to many events with its convenience to organizers and customers where a VIP Balcony on the 1st floor that overlooks the ground level. Film Festivals from the US, UK, France, Italy, Spain, Korea, and Japan are just some of the events that took place their o...

Name: Cinescape Marina
About: Cinescape MARINA is the fourth and final project in the Salmiyah area. This 3 screen theatre which is located in the Marina Mall opened its doors to movie-goers in 2003. With overwhelming crowds in the area, Cinescape Marina gave the opportunity to increase the variety of films with suitable timings around the clock as living in Salmiyah became the movie-goer heaven. The seating capacity of the Theatre is 806 seats.

Name: Cinescape 360
About: Cinescape 360 became the biggest Cinema Multiplex in the State of Kuwait in the year of 2009. With 2,687 seats spread across 15 screens made the cinema a regional attraction as it holds 2 VIP Screens that have state of the art facilities serving 48 customers per screen and the first ever Digital IMAX Screen. Cinescape 360 is located within 360 Mall on the 6th Ring Road in South Surra and fast became the number one attraction to entertainment seekers due to its size and variety in films.

Name: Cinescape Al - Muhallab
About: Cinescape MUHALLAB is the first Theatre to serve the Hawally area and the surrounding neighborhood. With 3 screens and a total capacity of 839 seats, the Theatre has become an attraction for students since it is located within the schools district.

Name: Cinescape Al - Fanar
About: Cinescape FANAR launched in 1997 to become the first Cinescape Theater to open in the Salmiyah area and be built within a mall. The 4 screen cinema which is located on Salem Al Mubarak street has been one of the busiest locations for Cinescape. To tackle this, a 5th screen was opened in the year 2000 which took the seating capacity totals to 1192 seats.
